title: astragalus subverticillatus
intro: Astragalus subverticillatus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae, that is native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus subverticillatus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus subverticillatus is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
